name: md2skill
description: Clinical decision-support skills for healthcare professionals. Each plugin converts published medical guidelines into structured AI prompts — specialty-organised, evidence-sourced, and ready to use in Claude Code.

plugins.name: pediatric-obesity-toolkit
plugins.description: 6 clinical decision-support skills for managing obesity in children aged 0–18. Covers intervention selection, pharmacotherapy (GLP-1RA, metformin, orlistat), bariatric surgery eligibility, non-stigmatising consultation (5As + 4Ms), atypical etiology screening, and monogenic/syndromic obesity diagnosis. Based on CMAJ 2025 Pediatric Obesity Guideline.

plugins.name: nhs-genomic-test-finder
plugins.description: Look up NHS England genomic tests for rare and inherited diseases. Covers 457 clinical indications from the National Genomic Test Directory v9.0 (April 2026). Returns R-codes, target gene panels, test methods, and commissioning categories (Core / Specialised / Highly Specialised).
